body.notes: Participation in IETF meetings constitutes agreement to the Note Well, which permits recording, transcription, and public archival of proceedings. See also BCP 78 (RFC 5378) and BCP 79 (RFC 8179) for IPR policies.

body.title: 04 - Guidelines for Authors and Reviewers of Documents Containing YANG Data Model

07 - YANG Metadata Annotation for Immutable Flag
08 - A Common YANG Data Model for Scheduling
10 -  YANG++: An idea from the YANG-next effort
11 - Automating Publication of Modules from Errata
